'''Jarrou''' was the [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the [[Endurance-class fleet carrier|''Endurance''-class fleet carrier]] [[Intrepid (Endurance-class)|''Intrepid'']] during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
